name: Aural Aria
outcome: [AttackerName] leans forward while bouncing her wide hips side to side, the movements coaxing her tits into a swaying parallel motion as they obscenely hang below her, keeping [TargetName]'s attention as the succubus cups her hand to her mouth to make a flurry of seductive lip and tongue sounds, the naughty recital magically filling both of [TargetHisOrHer] ears with a loving chorus of whispers, kisses, and coos!
miss: [AttackerName] leans forward while bouncing her wide hips side to side, the movement coaxing her tits into a swaying parallel motion as they obscenely hang below her, trying to keep [TargetName]'s attention as the succubus cups her hand to her mouth and makes a flurry of seductive lip and tongue sounds, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to wrench [TargetHisOrHer] focus away from the raunchy display!
statusOutcome: Even as the succubus straightens back up with a teasing smile, her aural affections continue to dizzyingly bounce around [TargetName]'s head, constantly filling his mind with enticements and temptations that erode away at [TargetHisOrHer] Willpower!
